challenge.title: Korak 6
challenge.description: Po podrazumevanju, ostale kartice ne bi trebalo da budu izabrane. To možete učiniti dodavanjem atributa aria-selected drugom i trećem elementima button i postavljanjem njihovih vrednosti na "false".

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents: Planets

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: Your second button element should have an aria-selected attribute.
Your second button element should have an aria-selected attribute set to "false".
Your third button element should have an aria-selected attribute.
Your third button element should have an aria-selected attribute set to "false".

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Planets

Earth is our home planet, known for its abundant water, diverse ecosystems, and life-supporting atmosphere. It's the only planet in the solar system known to harbor life.

Saturn is famous for its beautiful and extensive ring system made of ice and rock particles. It's a gas giant with dozens of moons orbiting it.

Mars, the red planet, is a rocky world with the tallest volcano and deepest canyon in the solar system. It's a key focus for exploration in the search for past or present life.
